invite.subject: Invitation to {platformName}
invite.mainText: You have been invited to create an account for the {platformName} platform. Click the button below to accept the invitation.
invite.footer: If you did not expect this invitation, you can ignore this email.
invite.footerHelp: If you have questions about using the platform, check the help section or send us an email.
invite.disclaimer: This email was automatically generated via {appUrl}.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password – {platformName}
passwordReset.mainText: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to set a new password.
passwordReset.footer: If you did not request a password reset, you can ignore this email.
passwordReset.footerHelp: If you have questions, feel free to send us an email.
passwordReset.disclaimer: This email was automatically generated via {appUrl}.

general.title: General settings
general.description: Platform name, logo and support email (e.g. for emails and footers).
general.logoUploadHelp: PNG, JPEG, SVG or WebP, max 2MB

templates.title: Email templates
templates.description: Customise texts for invite and password reset emails (per language)
templates.subject: Subject
